metadata.title: Homogenizers and High Shear Mixers | Welltech®
metadata.description: High-speed industrial mixers that ensure the production of smooth and stable products by breaking down fluids in different phases (like water and oil) at the micron level.

hero.title: Homogenizers
hero.desc: Obtain completely homogeneous, smooth, and non-separating (stable) emulsions by breaking down liquid-liquid or liquid-solid mixtures at the micron level.

technology.title: Rotor-Stator Shearing Technology
technology.desc: Homogenizers are high-speed (3,000 RPM) systems that break down mutually insoluble fluids down to the micron level. The specially designed Rotor-Stator toothed structure reduces the particle size by passing the fluid through a very narrow gap with High Shear force and strictly prevents the mixture from separating over time (phase separation).

features.title: Design and Performance Advantages
items: Hygienic Stainless Steel at FDA and 3A Standards
High Sealing and Long Life with Mechanical Seal
features.imgAlt: Homogenizer Motor and Rotor Stator Structure

table.title: Model Types and Application Areas
table.note: * The rotor-stator tooth structure (fine, medium, coarse particle passage) is specifically selected according to your product's viscosity and the desired final micron size.

rows.principle: Continuous circulation and shearing on the pipeline
Direct homogenization by immersing into the liquid in the tank
High shear unit integrated into the tank bottom
Ultra-fine micron emulsion with triple rotor-stator

items.q: What is the difference between a homogenizer and a normal mixer?
items.a: Normal mixers (agitators) only swirl the liquid; phases like oil and water will separate again when left to stand. A homogenizer, however, provides a permanent and non-separating emulsion by cutting (shearing) the particles down to the micron level.

items.q: Should I choose In-Line or Batch type?
items.a: If you have an existing tank and want to homogenize by circulating, choose In-Line; if you are going to mix and shear directly inside the tank, the Batch (Immersion) type should be selected.

cta.desc: Send us the structure of the product you will produce (e.g., ketchup or lotion), and let's choose the most suitable shearing head together.
